params.description: Check uncommitted content and recent log

params.command:

chore: update Claude Code session logs + harness state

## New

params.description: Show diff of state file and check gitignore

params.command:
git add -A && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
chore: session logs and harness state

questions.question: Session 對話 log 要一起 commit 嗎?

options.label: 全部一起 commit
options.description: 狀態檔 + session log 全部納入,沿用前一個 commit 45cbf9c 的慣例

options.label: 只 commit 狀態檔
options.description: 只 commit A 類狀態檔,session log 留在 working tree 不進版控

options.label: 把 log 加進 .gitignore
options.description: 只 commit 狀態檔,並把 .claude/logs/ 加入 .gitignore 以後不再追蹤

params.command:
git add -A && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
chore: session logs and harness state

Includes .claude/logs/session-*.jsonl
params.description: Commit harness state and session logs (user-confirmed)
